message:
Improve keyboard navigation and job duration display

docs.rs - Keyboard navigation improvements:
- Add Right arrow to focus content from list (in addition to Enter)
- Add Left arrow to return to list from content (in addition to Esc)
- Remove redundant standalone Left/Right handlers (now combined)
- Swap if/else for search_matches hint text (prefer empty check first)

jobs.rs - Duration display for running jobs:
- Show elapsed time with ⏱ indicator for running jobs
- Previously showed "—" for all jobs without end time
- Use created_at as deterministic reference for elapsed calculation
- Handle potential negative duration in generated test data with abs()
- Separate "not started" from "cancelled" cases for clarity

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
